name: hyrox-elite-platform
description: HYROX Delhi 2026 elite doubles prep platform with web, API, and Expo iOS app.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hyrox/shared && npm run build --workspace @hyrox/web && npm run build --workspace @hyrox/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @hyrox/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @hyrox/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @hyrox/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @hyrox/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @hyrox/mobile
